item.title: Which AAdvantage card is right for you? Here are 3 options you should consider
item.description: Citi has a few AAdvantage cobranded cards that are worth considering. Which one is right for you depends on how often you fly with the airline.

item.title: First look: Amtrak enters a 'whole new era' with Airo trains for the Cascades, Northeast Regional
item.description: Amtrak is ready to debut its first new Airo trains on the Cascades line in the Pacific Northwest this summer.

item.title: New airline math: How your points and miles are shaping where your favorite carrier flies
item.description: Airlines are picking destinations that will inspire loyalty program members to earn (and redeem) their points and miles — and maybe pick up a credit c...

item.title: United, JetBlue expand Blue Sky partnership, with elite perks coming by spring
item.description: United Airlines and JetBlue just expanded earning and redemption options for their loyalty members as part of a new partnership that launched last yea...

item.title: The best Caribbean cruise for every type of traveler
item.description: Royal Caribbean, Norwegian, Carnival, Disney Cruise Line and Windstar are among the lines with top cruise options in the Caribbean.
